name: Char's Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Dash Salt and pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash, peel, cube the potatoes, and boil in lightly salted water until tender.
2. Chop hard-boiled eggs using an egg slicer twice.
3. When the potatoes are ready, rinse them with cool water (coolness is not mandatory).
4. Mix the potatoes, eggs, mayonnaise, and mustard in a medium bowl.
5. Stir in salt, pepper, and garlic powder to taste.
6. If needed, adjust the amounts of mayonnaise and mustard to your preference.
Variations:
I use this same basic mayonnaise, mustard, S&P, and garlic powder combination for all such salads: tuna, chicken, egg, pasta, etc. I do not add things like onions, celery, relish, etc., but I add meats to pasta salad. Another variation with the pasta salad is small shrimp. The eggs are also included in my pasta salad, but not the tuna or chicken. Everyone seems to enjoy them, yet they are very easy.
